title: Parkio Daily 2026-04-27
teaser: Toy Story 5 merchandise launches today. Check out new products, park updates from Hollywood Studios, and what's happening across Disney parks.

rides.name: Space Mountain
rides.note: Classic favorite with typically shorter waits in the evening

rides.name: Rise of the Resistance
rides.note: Epic Star Wars adventure with cutting-edge technology

bignews.title: Toy Story 5 Merchandise Now Available
bignews.body: Disney and Pixar's Toy Story 5 merchandise has launched ahead of the film's June 19 theatrical release. New products include interactive talking figures from Mattel, LEGO playsets, collectibles from Funko and POP MART, Crocs boots inspired by Jessie, Away travel accessories, and Pandora jewelry. The collection features iconic characters plus newcomers Lilypad and Smarty Pants.

topstories.title: Interactive Toy Story 5 Figures Talk to Each Other
topstories.body: Mattel's new Toy Story 5 Playscale Interactables bring playtime to life with figures that recognize and talk to each other. The collection includes Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Lilypad, and Forky, each with their own iconic phrases. Available now at shop.mattel.com.

topstories.title: LeapFrog Debuts Explore & Learn Lilypad Toy
topstories.body: Kids can interact with the new character Lilypad through LeapFrog's educational toy featuring letters, numbers, and problem-solving games. The device lets children send text messages to Toy Story characters using emojis and preset messages. Available at Walmart.

topstories.title: Jessie-Inspired Crocs Boots Coming This Summer
topstories.body: Crocs will release Western-themed boots inspired by Jessie's iconic look, featuring denim and cow print collar, red trim with white lacing, and four Jessie-themed Jibbitz charms. The Toy Story 5 collection by Crocs launches June 16 on crocs.com and in select stores.

topstories.title: Away Travel Launches Toy Story 5 Collection
topstories.body: Away debuts travel essentials inspired by Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Aliens, and Lilypad. The collection includes rolling luggage, backpacks, and bag charms for kids and adults. Available June 9 on awaytravel.com and in select retail locations.

icymi.title: LEGO Toy Story 5 Barn Playset Available
icymi.body: LEGO's Blaze's Horse Ranch building set brings Wild West adventures home with 6 characters including Woody and Jessie minifigures plus Bullseye the horse. The Western-themed playset is available now at lego.com.

icymi.title: Pandora Toy Story Sheriff Star Bracelet Coming Soon
icymi.body: Pandora will release a Toy Story Sheriff Star Bracelet featuring blue and brown leather with an embossed sheriff star charm inspired by Woody. The Toy Story collection launches May 21 at us.pandora.net and select retail locations.

spotlight.title: Toy Story 5 Hits Theaters June 19
spotlight.body: Disney and Pixar's highly anticipated Toy Story 5 brings back Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, and the gang for an all-new adventure exploring the theme of 'toy meet tech' as Bonnie's imagination introduces exciting new characters. The extensive merchandise collection launching now lets fans celebrate before the film's theatrical debut.
